name: Fan Chieh Nius Ruh B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the meat against the grain into 1/4-inch-thick strips.
2. Add beef to Marinade and toss to coat. Cover and marinate for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
3. Cut green pepper and onion into 1-inch chunks; cut tomatoes into wedges and remove seeds.
4. Heat oil in a wok or skillet over high heat until very hot.
5. Add meat; stir-fry for 1 minute. Remove and set aside—don't overcook the meat.
6. Heat remaining oil in the wok or skillet over high heat.
7. Add green pepper and onion and stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Blend soy sauce, sherry, salt, and broth or water; cook for 2 minutes.
9. Add tomato wedges, and meat; mix well.
10. Stir in dissolved cornstarch; cook, stirring constantly until thickened.
11. Serve immediately.
